label: Quest script
description: Defines a RimWorld quest generation script and its root QuestNode program.

root.description: Entry QuestNode program for this quest script. The XML Class attribute selects the concrete QuestNode schema.

rootSelectionWeight.description: Base storyteller selection weight. If this is greater than 0 and autoAccept is false, expireDaysRange must have a positive max.

rootSelectionWeightFactorFromPointsCurve.description: SimpleCurve factor applied to rootSelectionWeight based on current points.

randomlySelectable.description: Whether this quest can be selected from the random quest pool.

rootMinPoints.description: Minimum threat points required before this root quest can be offered.

rootMinProgressScore.description: Minimum colony progress score required before this root quest can be offered.

rootEarliestDay.description: Earliest game day on which this root quest can be offered.

rootIncreasesPopulation.description: Marks quests that can increase colony population.

minRefireDays.description: Minimum days before the same quest script can fire again.

decreeSelectionWeight.description: Selection weight when this quest is considered for royal decrees.

decreeTags.description: String tags used to match royal decree sources.

questDescriptionRules.description: Inline RulePack used by quest grammar resolution.

questNameRules.description: Inline RulePack used by quest grammar resolution.

questDescriptionAndNameRules.description: Inline RulePack injected into both quest description and quest name resolution.

questContentRules.description: Inline RulePack used for in-quest letters and generated content.

questSubjectRules.description: Inline RulePack used to resolve the quest subject.

autoAccept.description: If true, the quest is accepted immediately. Source config rejects autoAccept together with a positive expireDaysRange max.

hideOnCleanup.description: If true, hide the quest after cleanup/completion.

expireDaysRange.description: Expiry days range before acceptance. -1~-1 means no expiry; required for random non-auto-accepted quests.

nameMustBeUnique.description: Requires generated quest names to be unique among active quests.

defaultChallengeRating.description: Default challenge rating shown in the quest UI. Values above 0 are only valid on root quests.

defaultHidden.description: Whether the quest is hidden by default in the quest log.

isRootSpecial.description: Marks this as a special root quest script.

canGiveRoyalFavor.description: Whether rewards from this quest may include royal favor.

questAvailableLetterLabel.description: Optional label override for the available quest letter.

questAvailableLetterDef.description: Optional LetterDef override for the available quest letter.

questAvailableLetterTextIsDescription.description: If true, the available-letter text uses the full quest description.

hideInvolvedFactionsInfo.description: If true, suppresses involved factions information in quest UI.

affectedByPopulation.description: Whether population affects this quest's generation or rewards.

affectedByPoints.description: Whether threat points affect this quest's generation or rewards.

defaultCharity.description: Marks this quest as charitable by default.

successHistoryEvent.description: HistoryEventDef fired when the quest succeeds.

failedOrExpiredHistoryEvent.description: HistoryEventDef fired when the quest fails or expires.

sendAvailableLetter.description: Whether the game sends an available quest letter.

epic.description: Marks this quest as part of an epic quest chain.

epicParent.description: Optional parent QuestScriptDef for an epic quest chain.

endOnColonyMove.description: Whether the quest ends when the player's colony moves.

everAcceptableInSpace.description: Allows acceptance on space-layer maps regardless of the usual space rule.

neverPossibleInSpace.description: Prevents this quest from generating in space.

givenBy.description: QuestGiverTag values that can offer this quest.

layerWhitelist.description: PlanetLayerDef whitelist. If non-empty, the quest can occur only on these layers.

layerBlacklist.description: PlanetLayerDef blacklist. These layers are excluded.

canOccurOnAllPlanetLayers.description: Bypasses layer whitelist and blacklist constraints.

basic-opportunity-site.label: Basic opportunity site quest
basic-opportunity-site.description: A randomly selectable opportunity quest with expiry and a grammar rule pack for name and description.
